zh.lifeSummary: 當Ludwig I. von Thüringen於1090年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇時，他的父親Ludwig 'der Springer' von Schauenburg Graf in Thüringen48歲，母親Adelheid von Stade30歲。他和Hedwig von Gudensberg至少有1個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1140年1月12日在德國賀林根藍德可萊斯 格塔福利德利可洛達萊音哈斯布盧恩享年50歲，埋葬在德國賀林根藍德可萊斯 格塔福利德利可洛達萊音哈斯布盧恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ludwig I. von Thüringen于1090年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇时，他的父亲Ludwig 'der Springer' von Schauenburg Graf in Thüringen48岁，母亲Adelheid von Stade30岁。他和Hedwig von Gudensberg至少有1个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1140年1月12日在德国賀林根藍德可萊斯 格塔福利德利可洛達萊音哈斯布盧恩享年50岁，埋葬在德国賀林根藍德可萊斯 格塔福利德利可洛達萊音哈斯布盧恩。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Thüringen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (Thüringer): habitational name for someone from Thuringia. The region is named from its former occupation by the T(h)uringii, an ancient Germanic tribe. Compare Deringer and Dieringer .

variants.name: Deringer
meanings: from a short form of an old personal name, a variant of Därr (see Darr ).
variant of Döringer, a habitational name for someone from Thuringia (see Doering ). Compare Derringer .

nameMeanings.name: Ludwig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from hlud ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’; an ancient royal and imperial name. See Louis .

variants.name: Louis
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

en.lifeSummary: When Ludwig I. von Thüringen was born in 1090, in Holy Roman Empire, his father, Ludwig 'der Springer' von Schauenburg Graf in Thüringen, was 48 and his mother, Adelheid von Stade, was 30. He had at least 1 son and 5 daughters with Hedwig von Gudensberg. He died on 12 January 1140, in Reinhardsbrunn, Friedrichroda, Gotha, Thuringia, Germany, at the age of 50, and was buried in Reinhardsbrunn, Friedrichroda, Gotha, Thuringia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ludwig I. von Thüringen est né en 1090, à Saint-Empire romain, son père, Ludwig 'der Springer' von Schauenburg Graf in Thüringen, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Stade, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles avec Hedwig von Gudensberg. Il est décédé le 12 janvier 1140, à Reinhardsbrunn, Friedrichroda, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Reinhardsbrunn, Friedrichroda, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ludwig I. von Thüringen 1090 in Heiliges Römisches Reich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ludwig 'der Springer' von Schauenburg Graf in Thüringen 48 und seine Mutter Adelheid von Stade 30. Er hatte mit Hedwig von Gudensberg mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Januar 1140 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Reinhardsbrunn, Friedrichroda, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Deutschland und wurde in Reinhardsbrunn, Friedrichroda, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ludwig I. von Thüringen è nato il nel 1090 nel Heiliges Römisches Reich, il suo padre, Ludwig 'der Springer' von Schauenburg Graf in Thüringen, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid von Stade, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie con Hedwig von Gudensberg. Morì il 12 gennaio 1140, nel Reinhardsbrunn, Friedrichroda, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Germania, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Reinhardsbrunn, Friedrichroda, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Ludwig I. von Thüringenが1090年にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチで生まれた時，父Ludwig 'der Springer' von Schauenburg Graf in Thüringenは48歳，母Adelheid von Stadeは30歳であった。彼はHedwig von Gudensbergとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1140年1月12日にドイツスuリンジェンランドクレイス ゴサフリードリチロダレインハードスブルンで50歳で死去し，ドイツスuリンジェンランドクレイス ゴサフリードリチロダレインハードスブルンにて埋葬された。

ko.Reinhardsbrunn, Friedrichroda, Gotha, Th: 독일 스u링 랜드크레이스 가스아 프리드리크로다 레인하르드스브루
ko.lifeSummary: Ludwig I. von Thüringen(이)가 1090년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ludwig 'der Springer' von Schauenburg Graf in Thüringen(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid von Stade(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Hedwig von Gudensberg(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1140년 1월 12일 독일 스u링 랜드크레이스 가스아 프리드리크로다 레인하르드스브루에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 스u링 랜드크레이스 가스아 프리드리크로다 레인하르드스브루에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ludwig I. von Thüringen nasceu em 1090, em Heiliges Römisches Reich, seu pai, Ludwig 'der Springer' von Schauenburg Graf in Thüringen, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Stade, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas com Hedwig von Gudensberg. Ele faleceu em 12 de janeiro de 1140, em Reinhardsbrunn, Friedrichroda, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Alemanha, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Reinhardsbrunn, Friedrichroda, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ludwig I. von Thüringen родился в 1090 г. в местности хилигесь рoмищесь раич, его отцу по имени Ludwig 'der Springer' von Schauenburg Graf in Thüringen было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Stade, 30. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей от Hedwig von Gudensberg. Он умер 12 января 1140 г. в местности ринардсбрунн, фриедричрода, ландкрис гота, тuринген, Германия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности ринардсбрунн, фриедричрода, ландкрис гота, тuринген, Германия.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas con Hedwig von Gudensberg. Murió el 12 de enero de 1140, en Reinhardsbrunn, Friedrichroda, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Alemania, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Reinhardsbrunn, Friedrichroda, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Alemania.
